Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The first model includes potential unfairness via an XOR branch after skill assessment one branch is standard cultural fit check the other is a community affiliation check that gives advantage The second model removes that XOR making all applicants go through the same cultural fit check

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to label activities accordingly ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck with loop for missing info RequestMoreInfo inside loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The description Resume Parsing and Initial Data Check then loop for missing info So we can have a sequence ReceiveApplication to DataCompletenessCheck loop if incomplete RequestMoreInfo then back to DataCompletenessCheck After that SkillAssessment then XOR for unfair model or direct for fair Then ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We also need to consider ordering after skill assessment the XOR branch Then after that either cultural fit or community check then managerial review then final decision

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Managerial Review and Final Decision as a step that examines borderline candidates But its a final step We can model ManagerialReview as an activity then FinalDecision Or combine Better to separate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So for unfair model start with ReceiveApplication then a loop for data completeness DataCompletenessCheck as first part then if incomplete RequestMoreInfo then loop back Then SkillAssessment Then XOR between CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Then ManagerialReview then FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For fair model same except no XOR after SkillAssessment directly CulturalFitCheck then ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: loop in POWL A B means do A then either exit or do B then A again In our case DataCompletenessCheck is the activity that checks if incomplete we RequestMoreInfo then redo DataCompletenessCheck So loops children first child DataCompletenessCheck second child RequestMoreInfo That works

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We can label DataCompletenessCheck as the activity that checks completeness then loop includes RequestMoreInfo as the back part

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For unfair model loop equals OperatorPOWL with LOOP children DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo Then xor equals OperatorPOWL with XOR children CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Then root equals StrictPartialOrder with nodes ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision Order edges ReceiveApplication to loop loop to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to xor xor to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For fair model no xor just CulturalFitCheck So root nodes ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision with order ReceiveApplication to loop loop to SkillAssessment SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck CulturalFitCheck to ManagerialReview ManagerialReview to FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In the unfair model one path is community check the other is standard cultural fit Thats fine
